positive: A central, intricate symmetrical circular emblem featuring stylized botanical elements interwoven with celestial motifs. Include glowing crescent moons, nebula swirls, geometric star constellations, and delicate, sprawling lunar flora (like phosphorescent ferns). The style should be a high-contrast, mystical neo-traditional tattoo flash mixed with Art Nouveau symmetry. Use a limited, deep jewel-toned palette: deep sapphire blue, emerald green, cosmic gold, and stark ivory white. Composition must be centered and highly detailed, maximizing negative space for clean silhouettes, suitable for an apparel print. The lighting should appear ethereal, as if emanating from the subject itself, creating strong, clear edges and perfect line work. Vector illustration quality, clean line art, perfect symmetry.
negative: low resolution, blur, noisy, artifact, text, signature, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, dirty, smudge, cropped, ugly, grayscale, monochrome, disfigured
